title: Expressions, Decisions, and Iteration · Runtime Trace: Loop Control
summary: Route support cases through explicit rules and iterate changing record sets without truthiness or termination defects. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js loop control increment in a transparent support-case routing engine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use break, continue, labels, and early return without skipping cleanup or required records.
Choose for, while, for-of, or collection operations from iteration meaning, mutation, and termination needs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
